title: Bobuc Generator
description: This is a mod i made for fun that adds a bunch of bobuc related stuff.
body:
list of things the mod adds:

### Blocks:
- "Real" Bobuc generator
- Fake bobuc generator
- Bobuc logs
- Bobuc ore
- Bobuc stone
- Bobuc planks
- Bobuc leaves
- Bobuc trapdoor
- Bobuc door
- bobuc fence
- bobuc fencegate
- bobuc grass
- bobuc dirt

 

### items:
- Bobuc sword
- bobux pickaxe
- bobuc axe
- bobuc shovel
- bobuc hoe
- bobuc material
- bobuc bill
- bobuc liquid
- flint and bobuc
- bobuc helmet
- bobuc chestplate
- bobuc leggings
- bobuc boots
- bobuc music disc


### entities:
- bobuc man

 

### dimension:
- bobuc dimension.

 

If you use this mod in a video please credit me.

honestly not sure why u would want to download this. this is just a project I made for the r/PhoenixSC reddit that started as 1 block then eventually became this whole thing.

if you're making a cursed modpack or just want something cursed, this mod is for you!
